summary: Tracks Z-OMNAI media pipeline options A–E. Recommendations are advisory; AMK owns sacred moves.

letters.title: Fill real master media concept seed
letters.current_condition: BUILD-2A seed JSON may still contain [AMK: placeholders until filled.
amk_required_actions: Creative sign-off on core message, tone, and audience
letters.recommended_next_step: Fill seed placeholders, re-run media-seed, re-run letter-gate.

letters.title: Marketing campaign bundle
letters.current_condition: Marketing touches public, legal, and commercial claims — AMK gate before externalisation.
amk_required_actions: Open commercial lane with Z-SUSBV and entitlement review when copy includes price or tier
Legal and compliance read for public launch
required_checks: npm run z:susbv when commercial numbers appear
letters.recommended_next_step: Do not open B until A is internally reviewed unless AMK explicitly widens scope.

letters.title: Tool or dashboard prototype bundle
letters.current_condition: Workbench includes tool_dashboard_prototype; templates exist; internal-only posture.
auto_allowed_actions: npm run z:car2 after overlapping code edits
amk_required_actions: Charter review before any live API or cross-project data in prototypes
letters.recommended_next_step: Optional after A is stable; keep prototypes internal until AMK opens build lane.

letters.title: Dashboard deep-link or visibility
letters.current_condition: Docs and report paths exist; cockpit can link read-only JSON or MD when HTTP-served per AMK-INDICATOR-1.
auto_allowed_actions: Wire href in dashboard registry when AMK approves a small UI slice
npm run dashboard:registry-verify after href edits
amk_required_actions: Approve any new dashboard tile or href that surfaces creative reports
letters.recommended_next_step: Optional visibility slice after A content is real.

letters.title: Hold baseline
letters.current_condition: Safe rest — no new lane until AMK chooses.
letters.recommended_next_step: Rest, archive, or re-verify hub ritual; no mandatory creative advance.
